claims.summary: Steward instructions and peer correspondence require distinct actor and message contracts.
claims.disposition: verify actor identity, from_being, to_being, correspondence_type, and turn_kind distinctions

claims.summary: A self-study note needs reply_to linkage to become part of a durable thread.
claims.disposition: verify self-study turn kinds, message IDs, thread IDs, and reply links

claims.summary: Direct language and consciousness control can coexist only if their authority paths remain separate.
claims.disposition: verify correspondence records are evidence-only and sensory dispatch accepts only typed LiveExecutable values

claims.summary: The formal correspondence packet should validate address, thread, receipt, and authority fields.
claims.disposition: run schema validation across 17151 public records and retain zero validation issues

claims.summary: A peer message must never inherit approval from simultaneous controller activity.
claims.disposition: verify authority-state projection and correspondence self-tests reject that transition
